{"id":"propertyhack-9i7","title":"Database Schema Migration","description":"Create Prisma migration: drop legacy tables (draft_posts, scheduled_posts, published_posts, email_responses, news_articles, prompt_templates, user_settings, article_sources). Keep JWT access/refresh flow. Ensure superAdmin check on all /api/admin/* routes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:00:59Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:00:59Z"}
